TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: mu' bicyu in'yanux Tayal bih llyung Klesan kya ga maki ci inbuyan yow na gaga na pkita kayal kwe, baley ci cnpngan ta p'yugan na kayal hiya ga knahul nya ubuy pkhngyan ro knita krryax. yani maha kwara knba'an ta kwe, skura ita Tayal ga piyang na yow, utux yow ga galan ta gnmilan na s'yanux ta, utux yow lwey ga kahul tkba' ta tgamil yow kwe ro p'aras hi'an na klhangan ta ita Tayal, kwe ga piyang myasa na knba'an, maki knita na cka Tayal hiya, "mita kayal" ro p'yugan na bhuyow kwara khoni, nya pkita maha kba' nya p'yuw kayal kwe, cyoli Tayal ga pgluw p'yuw na kayal kbaley ryax ro kita pntyagan ta. yani nyu sbiru suruw micu: mu' bicyu:ke Tayal mhtuw tyaba na bicyu bih babow kayal ga "mu' bicyu" yow nya san ta, mu' bicyu kayal kwe ga, nya pkita maha ya kinga mhtuw yani msbehuy ma.
S.PHON: muʔ βiʦ~ʨju inʔjanux tajal βiħ lljuŋ kles~ɕan kja ɣa maki ʦ~ʨi inβujan jow na ɣaɣa na pkita kajal kwe, βalej ʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨnpŋan ta pʔjuɣan na kajal ħija ɣa knaħul nja uβuj pkħŋjan ro knita krrjax. jani maħa kwara knβaʔan ta kwe, s~ɕkura ita tajal ɣa pijaŋ na jow, utux jow ɣa ɣalan ta ɣnmilan na s~ɕʔjanux ta, utux jow lwej ɣa kaħul tkβaʔ ta tɣamil jow kwe ro pʔaras~ɕ ħiʔan na klħaŋan ta ita tajal, kwe ɣa pijaŋ mjas~ɕa na knβaʔan, maki knita na ʦ~ʨka tajal ħija, "mita kajal" ro pʔjuɣan na βħujow kwara kħoni, nja pkita maħa kβaʔ nja pʔjuw kajal kwe, ʦ~ʨjoli tajal ɣa pɣluw pʔjuw na kajal kβalej rjax ro kita pntjaɣan ta. jani nju s~ɕβiru s~ɕuruw miʦ~ʨu: muʔ βiʦ~ʨju:ke tajal mħtuw tjaβa na βiʦ~ʨju βiħ βaβow kajal ɣa "muʔ βiʦ~ʨju" jow nja s~ɕan ta, muʔ βiʦ~ʨju kajal kwe ɣa, nja pkita maħa ja kiŋa mħtuw jani ms~ɕβeħuj ma.
S.FORM: mu' bicyu in'yanux Tayal bih llyung Klesan kya ga maki ci inbuyan yow na gaga na pkita kayal kwe, baley ci cnpngan ta p'yugan na kayal hiya ga knahul nya ubuy pkhngyan ro knita krryax. yani maha kwara knba'an ta kwe, skura ita Tayal ga piyang na yow, utux yow ga galan ta gnmilan na s'yanux ta, utux yow lwey ga kahul tkba' ta tgamil yow kwe ro p'aras hi'an na klhangan ta ita Tayal, kwe ga piyang myasa na knba'an, maki knita na cka Tayal hiya, "mita kayal" ro p'yugan na bhuyow kwara khoni, nya pkita maha kba' nya p'yuw kayal kwe, cyoli Tayal ga pgluw p'yuw na kayal kbaley ryax ro kita pntyagan ta. yani nyu sbiru suruw micu: mu' bicyu:ke Tayal mhtuw tyaba na bicyu bih babow kayal ga "mu' bicyu" yow nya san ta, mu' bicyu kayal kwe ga, nya pkita maha ya kinga mhtuw yani msbehuy ma.
S.PHON: muʔ βiʦ~ʨju inʔjanux tajal βiħ lljuŋ kles~ɕan kja ɣa maki ʦ~ʨi inβujan jow na ɣaɣa na pkita kajal kwe, βalej ʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨnpŋan ta pʔjuɣan na kajal ħija ɣa knaħul nja uβuj pkħŋjan ro knita krrjax. jani maħa kwara knβaʔan ta kwe, s~ɕkura ita tajal ɣa pijaŋ na jow, utux jow ɣa ɣalan ta ɣnmilan na s~ɕʔjanux ta, utux jow lwej ɣa kaħul tkβaʔ ta tɣamil jow kwe ro pʔaras~ɕ ħiʔan na klħaŋan ta ita tajal, kwe ɣa pijaŋ mjas~ɕa na knβaʔan, maki knita na ʦ~ʨka tajal ħija, "mita kajal" ro pʔjuɣan na βħujow kwara kħoni, nja pkita maħa kβaʔ nja pʔjuw kajal kwe, ʦ~ʨjoli tajal ɣa pɣluw pʔjuw na kajal kβalej rjax ro kita pntjaɣan ta. jani nju s~ɕβiru s~ɕuruw miʦ~ʨu: muʔ βiʦ~ʨju:ke tajal mħtuw tjaβa na βiʦ~ʨju βiħ βaβow kajal ɣa "muʔ βiʦ~ʨju" jow nja s~ɕan ta, muʔ βiʦ~ʨju kajal kwe ɣa, nja pkita maħa ja kiŋa mħtuw jani ms~ɕβeħuj ma.
